function.name: parse_datetime
function.description: Validate and normalize an ISO-8601 datetime range.

function.name: geocode
function.description: Resolve a place name to a bounding box and geometry via geocoding.

function.name: collections_rag
function.description: Search for relevant STAC collections using semantic search.

function.name: select_collection
function.description: Record the user's collection and optional variable selection.

function.name: stac_search
function.description: Search STAC catalog for COG items. Reads bbox and datetime from state.

function.name: compute_stats
function.description: Fetch raster zonal statistics. Reads geometry, items, and collection info from state.

function.name: build_viz_tiles
function.description: Build raster tile URLs for visualization. Reads items and collection info from state.
